Navigation.categoryMenuHint: Choose a category to open its public video collection.
Navigation.categoryMenuEmpty: No active categories are available yet.

SubscriptionsPage.title: Manage membership access in one place
SubscriptionsPage.description: Track joined channels, renewal status, expiry dates, and auto-renewal controls when you need them.

autoRenew.title: Auto-renewal
autoRenew.description: New memberships enable auto-renewal by default. If you cancel renewal, your current access stays active until the cycle expires.

note.title: Protected access
note.cancel: Canceling renewal only stops the next cycle; it does not remove access that is still valid.
note.admin: If a channel pauses new memberships, you can still watch member content until your current cycle ends.

Subscriptions.title: Membership plans
Subscriptions.channelCount: {count, plural, =0 {No channels} one {# channel} other {# channels}}
Subscriptions.emptyDescription: When you join a channel membership, its access level and renewal details will appear here.

autoRenew.enabledDescription: New memberships enable auto-renewal by default. You can cancel renewal and keep watching until the expiry date.
autoRenew.inactiveDescription: You can renew from the channel management page if this plan is still available.
autoRenew.accessUntilFallback: You will keep access through the current cycle.

errors.cancelFailedRetry: Unable to cancel auto-renewal. Please try again.

TopUpPackages.title: Aura Coin Top-up Packages
TopUpPackages.errorDescription: The payment service or network is temporarily unavailable. Please try again.
TopUpPackages.emptyDescription: There are no active top-up packages right now. Please check back later.

TopUpSuccess.metadataDescription: Your Aura Coins have been successfully added to your wallet.
TopUpSuccess.title: Payment Successful!
TopUpSuccess.description: Your Aura Coins have been added to your wallet.
TopUpSuccess.secureReceipt: Transaction processed securely via Aura Pay. Receipt sent to your email.

Monetization.title: Pricing Strategy
Monetization.description: Configure how viewers access your content. Aura Coins power unlocks and creator settlements.

price.title: Video Listing Price
price.description: Set the access fee in Aura Coins. Use 0 AC for free releases.

tier.title: Required Membership Tier
tier.description: Optional. Pulled from your channel membership tiers to restrict access by level.
tier.count: {count, plural, =0 {0 tiers} one {# tier} other {# tiers}}
tier.empty: No membership tiers found. Create tiers in Studio Membership first.

earnings.title: Earnings Breakdown
earnings.drmNote: Aura DRM protects premium releases. Unlock payments settle automatically to your Wallet.

errors.tiersUnavailable: Channel membership tiers are not available.
errors.loadFailed: Unable to load this channel's membership tiers.
